entries.note: V62-B reuses the shipped V62-A admission and ingress bridge surfaces by default.
V62-B adds only one explicit outbound external-assistant egress bridge packet.
V62-B preserves the external_assistant connector principal and keeps human_via_connector deferred.
V62-B consumes shipped V61-B bridge-office and rewitness posture explicitly where selected.
V62-B carries direct positive rewitness basis summary rather than relying only on upstream refs.
V62-B keeps the selected admitted connector path non-generalizing by default.
